tracking.note: Enriched from the imported ranking-page seed using the official PolyU staff page.

sources.note: The ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a PolyU affiliation for the imported seed.

The official PolyU staff page says he received his B.S. and M.S. from Wuhan University, obtained his Ph.D. from The Hong Kong Polytechnic University under Prof. Rocky K.C. Chang, and then spent two years at Georgia Tech as a postdoctoral research fellow advised by Prof. Wenke Lee.
